content: Push notifications (FCM/APNs) are not guaranteed delivery: a 2xx from APNs/FCM only means the provider accepted the message, not that the device received it; iOS silent/background pushes are explicitly not guaranteed and can be dropped based on battery/network state; FCM queues offline messages up to 4 weeks then drops after TTL. Real-world delivery rate ~85-90% best case, can fall below 40% with bad implementation.
